title: The Juan Mod
description: The biggest update: Maple Wood, Lavender, and Juan.
body:
![Tweet by Opera GX of a meme with caption "Minecraft devs be like "We're proud to present our biggest update yet" and then it's just this" with a  picture of a set of maple wood, a retextured purple poppy labeled "lavender," and a weird looking cow with big eyes called "Juan"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3037bc3cc4d99bc3a2b265bd6be55f29055a78cf_0.webp)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zRIB-cuwMgQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This is a mod that adds Juan, a maple wood set, a new lavender flower, and a couple structures I made cuz I was bored. 

This mod was mainly a way for me to learn how to use MCreator and isn't super fancy or anything.

# **MAIN FEATURES**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>




# JUAN
![A picture of Juan, a weird looking cow with big eyes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc03f9f3e80b53f8c6e58dd633f3582b0cdec34a.png)

Spawns throughout the world. can be bred with Lavender. Model recreated by me. There are inaccuracies to the picture as I'm writing this I only just noticed they're supposed to have udders. 

As if 1.1.0 Juan's drop Juan Meat and Juan leather.

Baby Juans do not look any different than an adult Juan (I couldn't figure it out in MCreator :P)

# LAVENDER
![a purple flower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e52927acab7db6296c412f35d88102ba8dff620.png)

Also spawns throughout the world. Can be crafted into Purple Dye

# Maple Wood
![A tree with a purple-gray trunk and orange leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c4284a97c633828b51901619ce74ed0324d0466.png)
![a set of desaturated pinkish-purple wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a4ccb348aeb6d97803c734efc701a6038baf1fc.png)
Maple trees spawn in forests. Is a tree. You know how Trees work.


# Juan Land

![A biome with cyan grass and a bunch of tall trees with orange leaves ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8adc8df3017c329c95eeb9151f7fbc59209a7b64_0.webp)

Generates throughout the world. Juan spawns in bigger groups in this biome and big maple trees spawn. These trees are wholey original and definitely are not retextured jungle and dark oak trees. You cannot grow big maple trees. 

</details>


# **STRUCTURES**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

# Juan Farm

![A little house made out of maple wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe1e79aade83454154ef64a7a94662a17fc8eede_0.webp)

Juan Farms spawn throughout the world. There is a little farm of Juans in the back and the house is occupied by a villager. 

# Ruined Juan

![A structure made out of prismarine resembling Juan's head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c452a1702b9ebfec7b79a3f2cba834c478ddd110.png)

Ruined Juans spawn throughout the Juanlands. They contain two monster spawners and two dungeon chests. They may be too common *shrugs*

# Ruineder Juan

![A Ruined Juan in a great state of disrepear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3e60414242bade7e2668edfaf096fa62ff7f616.png)

Ruineder Juans rarely spawn throughout the overworld. They don't have anything of note in them. 

</details>


I'm unsure if I'll update this mod further, but if I do I might add a Juanland village or something inside the Ruineder Juan.

This mod has no association with Opera GX
